summary: PR #2692 performed implementation-only SysDolphin baselib matching work in audio, camera object, particle, and TExp files. The PR body reports 12 newly exact functions across 4 files with zero slice regressions, while the bot report shows 11 new matches and 7 unmatched-item improvements. Review focused on avoiding fakematching: pointer-math/while-loop shapes in axdriver, local externs used to influence cobj inlining, new pragmas in particle, static-vs-extern rodata placement, and a likely fsqrt inline in particle.

key_files.role: SysDolphin audio matching work; exacted AXDriver_8038C6C0 and AXDriver_8038DA70 per bot report, improved HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize, adjusted CLAMP expression temporaries, parsed pointer-table data, and reworked aux heap loops/static dimension tables.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: files list and exact-match summary

review_comments: jurrejelle comment r3409825010 about fakematching/pointer math/whiles-to-fors
review_comments: jurrejelle comment r3409825653 about turning extern rodata back into statics

key_files.role: Camera object matching work; added small static inline accessors/wrappers, expanded viewing matrix setup into HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr and HSD_CObjGetInvViewingMtxPtr, and used inline helper layers to shape HSD_CObjGetUpVector calls.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector, HSD_CObjGetUpVector, HSD_CObjSetUpVector, HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr, HSD_CObjGetInvViewingMtxPtr new matches
review_comments: jurrejelle r3409828143 says local extern tactic is regression and suggests inline helper layers

key_files.role: Particle matching work; introduced ParticleFloatBytes, adjusted hsd_804CF740 declaration/definition placement, changed hsd_803931A4 channel flag access, added pool_data pragma around hsd_80394068, improved screen-state and exception-node access patterns, and modified math in hsd_80398F8C.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: hsd_803931A4, hsd_80394068, hsd_80395644 new matches; hsd_80398F8C and hsd_80395D88 improved

key_files.role: Small TExp matching change; bot report identifies HSD_TExpSimplify2 as a new exact match, but loaded diff excerpt does not show the hunk.

what_changed: The PR body states exact-match decompilation for SysDolphin audio, camera object, particle, and TExp implementation files and claims 12 newly exact functions across 4 files with zero regressions.
Bot output reports new exact matches in axdriver, cobj, texpdag, and particle, plus improvements in still-unmatched axdriver and particle functions.

axdriver.c changed assertion shape from HSD_ASSERT to HSD_ASSERTMSG with a state temporary, split CLAMP inputs into cmd_val temporaries, revised AXDriver_8038DA70 pointer-table parsing, and rewrote HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize around loops over reverb dimension arrays.
cobj.c added small static inline helpers for roll/up access and a two-layer get_up_vector_for_viewing_mtx wrapper, then expanded viewing matrix setup logic directly in pointer-returning functions.

particle.c moved hsd_804CF740 from an immediate definition to an extern plus later definition, added a narrow pool_data pragma in an existing pragma region, used typed local pointers for particle screen state and exception nodes, and adjusted math/local lifetime shapes in hsd_80398F8C.
texpdag.c had a 2-line add/1-line delete hunk, with HSD_TExpSimplify2 listed by the bot as a new exact match, but the loaded diff slice does not expose the specific source change.

smart_moves.text: The final cobj diff avoids the earlier local extern tactic and instead uses static inline helper layers around HSD_CObjGetUpVector, matching reviewer guidance to dissuade inlining without source-local redeclarations.
HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize was made more source-like by replacing repeated manual accumulation blocks with bounded for loops over dimension arrays.

Some generated-looking direct global/field access in particle was localized through typed temporary pointers such as ParticleScreenState* sp, ExcptNode* node, and u32* ctx_words, improving reviewability without broad type changes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a local extern declaration is used only to alter MWCC inlining, reviewers may reject it even if it improves objdiff; try narrow static inline helper layers first.
evidence_refs: review_comments: author claimed local extern improved HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr/HSD_CObjGetInvViewingMtxPtr objdiff
review_comments: jurrejelle r3409828143 called it a regression and suggested inline helper layers

decomp_lessons.lesson: Reviewer pressure favored natural loops and less pointer math in AXDriver_8038DA70; pointer-table relocation code should still be tested against cleaner for-loop or typed access shapes before accepting generated-looking while/index juggling.
New pragmas can be controversial even when narrowly scoped and match-improving; reviewers may still object that the shape is not likely authored source.
evidence_refs: review_comments: author r3409741017 reports pool_data wrapper gives hsd_80393DA0 100%
review_comments: jurrejelle r3409832861 says the pragma is wrong and should eventually be removed

decomp_lessons.lesson: For hand-written square-root approximations using __frsqrte refinement, search for existing fsqrt inline patterns before preserving expanded generated math.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use bounded for loops over repeated dimension groups in HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize rather than repeated manual summation blocks.
Introduce small inline wrapper layers to influence whether HSD_CObjGetUpVector is inlined at viewing-matrix call sites.
Keep PAD_STACK narrow and function-local where used in cobj and particle matching changes; evidence shows PAD_STACK(24), PAD_STACK(16), and PAD_STACK adjustments in touched functions.
A narrow #pragma pool_data off inside an existing push/dont_inline block was used for hsd_80394068, but review evidence is mixed and warns against treating this as normal style.
For float absolute value and square-root-like code in particle, raw bit-masking and __frsqrte refinement appeared in the diff; reviewer suggested searching for an existing fsqrt inline instead.

follow_up_queries: Search current particle.c and math headers for existing fsqrt inline helpers similar to hsd_80398F8C __frsqrte refinement.
Search current axdriver.c history for AXDriver_8038DA70 to see whether pointer-table parsing was later made more natural with for loops or typed structs.
Search current cobj.c for get_up_vector_for_viewing_mtx to confirm whether inline helper layers remained after merge.
Search current particle.c pragma regions to identify whether pool_data/dont_inline pragmas were later removed or narrowed.
Search current symbols/config metadata for AXDriver_803B95F8 and AXDriver_803B9618 rodata ownership if curating a data-placement note.
Search texpdag.c PR diff or final source around HSD_TExpSimplify2 because the loaded diff excerpt did not include the hunk.

notes: PR identity, changed files, author, state, and merge time are strongly evidenced by metadata and raw PR JSON.
Verification claims are taken from the PR body and bot report; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.

Review evidence is mixed: the author defended local externs/pragmas with objdiff claims, while jurrejelle objected to them as source-shape regressions. The final loaded diff appears to incorporate at least some review feedback, such as cobj inline helpers and static reverb data.
The raw diff and review_comments files are truncated, so particle hsd_80398F8C and texpdag.c details are incomplete.
The PR body says 12 newly exact functions, while the loaded bot report excerpt lists 11 new matches; this record preserves both as reported rather than reconciling them.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline helper layers are preferred over local extern redeclarations for cobj inlining control
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2692, local extern declarations for HSD_CObjGetUpVector were challenged as a regression despite claimed objdiff gains; reviewer guidance suggested using inline helper layers to dissuade MWCC from inlining, and the loaded final diff shows get_up_vector_for_viewing_mtx helper layers.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Natural loops and reduced pointer math were explicitly requested for axdriver pointer-table parsing
accepted_candidate_records.text: Reviewer feedback on AXDriver_8038DA70 asked to reduce generated-looking pointer math and try for-loop forms before accepting the match shape.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Search for existing fsqrt inlines before keeping expanded __frsqrte sequences
accepted_candidate_records.text: Reviewer feedback on particle hsd_80398F8C suggested the raw __frsqrte refinement sequence was probably a call to an existing fsqrt inline and should be searched across the codebase.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer inline helper layers over local extern redeclarations for inlining control
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding guidance that source-local extern redeclarations used only to affect inlining should be treated as a high-risk matching tactic. Try static inline wrapper layers or other authored-source-like forms first, and require narrow objdiff evidence if a redeclaration remains.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards cover truthful headers and matching tactics, but this PR provides a concrete recurring pattern: local externs can suppress inlining yet be rejected as source-shape regressions.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat new pragmas as source-style debt even when scoped and objdiff-supported
source_update_candidates.text: Consider strengthening pragma guidance to say that tightly scoped pragmas with objdiff evidence may still be unacceptable if local authored-source evidence suggests the original developers would not have written them; record cleanup/search alternatives before accepting.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR shows a direct conflict between narrow objdiff benefit and reviewer source-style objection.

source_update_candidates.title: Search for existing math inline wrappers before preserving expanded reciprocal-square-root code
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an example under canonical control-flow/macros or header-inlines: expanded __frsqrte Newton refinement in game code may correspond to an existing fsqrt inline/helper and should be searched before accepting manual expansion.
source_update_candidates.reason: Reviewer explicitly identified a probable fsqrt inline recovery opportunity.

source_update_candidates.title: SysDolphin baselib PR #2692 touched audio, camera object, particle, and TExp implementation files
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2692 changed src/sysdolphin/baselib/axdriver.c, cobj.c, particle.c, and texpdag.c for implementation-only matching work.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful searchable path-scope fact for curator review; do not promote without checking path-facts ownership.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the author's local extern justification as an accepted standard; reviewer feedback explicitly disputed it and the final diff appears to use inline helper layers instead.
Do not promote new particle pragmas as accepted style; reviewer feedback says they are wrong from authored-source style despite claimed objdiff benefit.
Do not infer texpdag.c source tactics from this slice because the loaded diff excerpt does not include the texpdag hunk.
Do not treat the PR body's exact-match/regression claims as independently verified by this intake; record them as PR evidence only.
